title: Void Ascension
description: Void Ascension is a mod based around the void growing a sentient thought process, wanting to destroy all living things. Which thrusts the player into action.
body:
Just a mod I have been putting my free time into for awhile and decided to go full time into working on it so expect updates frequently.

In this mod you will be fighting the void, which has grew a scientiant mind set, and is aiming to invelope the overworld in a everlasting nothingness.

The mod at this moment adds a few weapons and tools, some blocks, two armor sets, three hostile mobs, one biome, and one dimension.

I will be putting a list of features that will be put in the mod down below with Finished, WIP, and not started status.


WIP:Entity Models

WIP:Armor Models

Not Started:Rift Models

WIP:Dimensions

Not Started:Ability Animations

WIP:Weapon Models

WIP:Tool Models

Not Started:Sounds

WIP:Menus

 

It is not in order of priority this is just a list of what I am working on at the moment, more will be added to the list if I feel I want to add another feature.


![The corruption seeping from his domain.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b09ed63a82356cf82395269dc641fb8c004a196_0.webp)

![The gateway to his domain.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eef88155d5afdbff629e8738bf55d1dd4997911a_0.webp)

![His first dagger in the map.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adb773352a12545f90c7002ed9721342ec7904e4_0.webp)

![All of the mod items and blocks.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21ae385affcdb3cf4cd7af651fa0c04fc91549c0_0.webp)

If you want to chat about the mod, suggest a feature, or just ask me a question. Join the mod Discord.


Harkan Cross
